criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance financial management features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, and developer information.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall usability and design quality of the app.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Security
criteria.description: The robustness of the app's security measures to protect user data.

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: The affordability of the app, considering both free and premium features.
